description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 30, 2024 at 1:33 AM PT, a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on Jerrold Avenue at Barneveld Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was stopped at a stop sign on Jerrold Avenue and yielding to a pickup truck that was in the intersection making a left turn 
from Barneveld Avenue onto Jerrold Avenue when the front right corner of the SUV, which was traveling behind the Waymo AV, made 
contact with the rear left corner of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous 
mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
